name: cmdcraft
documentation:
# cmdcraft

`cmdcraft` is a library that aims to build fast and stable
interative devtools. It that native Python metadata from objects to build prompt
commands, so you don't have to manually configure input options.

```{image} docs/source/images/example.gif
```

## Features

- Asynchronous and parallel tasks using asyncio
- Easy function to command interface
- Out of box functionality
- Intuitive usability

# Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please start by reading the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUING.rst) file.

# Special thanks

- [Python Prompt Toolkit](https://github.com/prompt-toolkit/python-prompt-toolkit): Awesome prompt utility.

classes.name: cmdcraft.completer.CommandCompleter

methods.name: cmdcraft.completer.CommandCompleter.__init__
documentation:
CommandCompleter constructor.

Args:
    command (Command): Command which will be used as base.
    ignore_case (bool, optional): Sets if input should be case-sensitive
        or not. Defaults to True.

methods.name: cmdcraft.completer.CommandCompleter._get_pcompletions
documentation:
Get parameter completions.

Args:
    prompt (str): Prompt input.
    document (Document): Current document object.
    complete_event (CompleteEvent): Completion event.

Returns:
    Iterable[Completion]: List of Completions for current prompt.

methods.name: cmdcraft.completer.CommandCompleter._get_acompletions
documentation:
Get argument completions.

Args:
    prompt (str): Prompt input.
    document (Document): Current document object.
    complete_event (CompleteEvent): Completion event.

Returns:
    Iterable[Completion]: List of Completions for current prompt.

methods.name: cmdcraft.completer.CommandCompleter.get_completions
documentation:
Get list of completions for current input.

Args:
    document (Document): Current document object.
    complete_event (CompleteEvent): Completion event.

Returns:
    Iterable[Completion]: List of Completions for current prompt.

classes.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter

methods.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter.__init__
documentation:
Construct a new Parameter object.

Args:
    name (str): Parameter name.
    ptype (type | None, optional): Parameter type. Defaults to None.
    default (any, optional): Default value. Defaults to None.

methods.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter.name
documentation:
Return parameter name.

Returns:
    str: Parameter name.

methods.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter.default
documentation:
Return parameter default value.

Returns:
    any: Default value.

methods.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter.options
documentation:
Return parameter options.

Returns:
    list[str]: List of options.

methods.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter.cast
documentation:
Cast a value to this parameter type.

Args:
    value (str): Value to be cast.

Returns:
    any: The cast value.

methods.name: cmdcraft.parameter.Parameter.set_dynamic_options
documentation:
Set dynamic options for the parameter.

This allows the completer to suggest options based on previous operations, like
connected usernames.

Args:
    generator (callable): Callable which should return a list of options.

Parameter wrapper.

This class handles individual parameters to extract information about its
annotation type, name and default value.

!/usr/bin/env python3

classes.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.__init__
documentation: Command Set initializer.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.init
documentation: Init the interpreter object.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.output
documentation: Output command.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.run
documentation: Run Prompter main loop.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.is_running
documentation:
Returns if the execution loop is active.

Returns:
    bool: True if the loop is active, False otherwise.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.register_command
documentation:
Register a command into the interpreter.

Args:
    command (callable): Callable.
    alias (str | None, optional): Command alias. Defaults to None.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.commands
documentation:
Return the available commands.

Returns:
    dict: Commands dictionary.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.interpret
documentation:
Interpret user input.

This method is used to parse input commands, handling eventual failures
and raised exceptions.

Args:
    cmdline (str): Input command as single string line.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.help
documentation:
Show Cmdcraft interpreter help.

The interpreter receives instructions from the standard input (stdin) to
dynamically execute operations on running services.

For further help, type the command `help [command]`.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.clear
documentation: Clear both command history and screen.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.history
documentation: Show command history.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.save
documentation:
Save the current command history to a file.

This may be used to save the current command history as an external file
for posterior loading.

If the provided file path is not absolute, the contents will be saved
into `routines` folder.

Args:
    file (str): Filename.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.load
documentation:
Load a command file.

This may be used to recover previously saved command history into the
current execution list.

If the provided file path is not absolute, the contents will be loaded
from `routines` folder.

Args:
    file (str): Filename.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.wait
documentation:
Block the execution list for given time.

Args:
    delay (float): Blocks execution for given time in seconds.

methods.name: cmdcraft.base.BasePrompter.quit
documentation:
Stop the execution loop.

This method calls for a graceful exit, waiting the current scheduled
commands to execute.

Prompter basic command set.

This class offers an operational command set to be embedded into the CLI
interpreter.
